TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Swasal ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 161 buwan, 509 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 494 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 74%, Bunun 7%, Tayan 6%, Amis 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Swasal hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Swasal hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Swasal hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Swasal hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Swasal hya' ga Tausa. tay 'llaw na Swasal hya' ga Dauqpusan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Swasal ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕwas~ɕal ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa taus~ɕa. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa *auqpus~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕwas~ɕal ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Swasal ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 161 buwan, 509 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 494 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 74%, Bunun 7%, Tayan 6%, Amis 2%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Swasal hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Swasal hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Swasal hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Swasal hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Swasal hya' ga Tausa. tay 'llaw na Swasal hya' ga Dauqpusan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Swasal ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕwas~ɕal ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa taus~ɕa. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕwas~ɕal ħjaʔ ɣa *auqpus~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕwas~ɕal ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
